title: Implement webhook event system
description: webhooks.ts loads config but no events are fired. Wire up events for profile switches, limit hits, and usage thresholds.

context.text: Webhook event system with delivery+retry, event bus integration, usage monitoring. Tests in webhooks.test.ts.

acceptanceCriteria: Events fire on: profile_switch, limit_reached, limit_recovered, usage_threshold (70/90)
Webhook delivery with retry (3 attempts, exponential backoff)
Test coverage for delivery and retry
